requests
beautifulsoup4

python-dotenv
pdfplumber
numpy
pandas
scikit-learn
hdbscan
umap-learn
prophet
psutil
# Optional: enables EMBEDDING_BACKEND=sentence_transformers (in-process MiniLM,
# 90 MB model, no Ollama required). Installs torch (~1 GB). Comment out if you
# only want the Ollama embedding backend and care about install footprint.
sentence-transformers
# YouTube transcript scraper (Stage 6). yt-dlp lists channel videos without
# an API key; youtube-transcript-api pulls auto-generated captions.
yt-dlp
youtube-transcript-api
